center.name: Araucaria moist forests
center.summary: Araucaria moist forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Black-banded owl、Robust woodpecker，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Ecuador they were almost exclusively recorded in the humid forest of the North-East, they were also found in the Atlantic, igapò, and terra-firme forests of Brazil, Araucaria forests, and man-made or disturbed habitats, such as clearings, agricultural land and suburban areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits intact humid and Araucaria moist forests; it shuns disturbed forest unless large trees remain
